feed.title: Asclepius — changelog
feed.subtitle: Versioned release log for the Asclepius clinical-AI trust substrate.

entry.title: v0.3.0 — consent on the chain, evidence harness GA
entry.summary: Consent flows through the ledger; evidence harness ships ground-truth ingest; CLI + Python bindings + public website land.
entry.content:
• Consent grants/revocations now append consent.granted + consent.revoked ledger entries.
  • EvaluationHarness::attach_ground_truth() + signed evidence-bundle export.
  • Drift monitor: PSI, KS, EMD on per-feature histograms with DriftSeverity::classify.
  • asclepius CLI: ledger verify, ledger inspect, evidence bundle, evidence verify.
  • Python bindings (pybind11). Wheels for cp310-cp312.
  • Public website + in-browser playground.

entry.title: v0.2.0 — policy chain solidified
entry.summary: Composable PolicyChain with allow/modify/block verdicts; built-in policies; USTAR evidence bundles.
entry.content:
• Composable PolicyChain with allow / modify / block verdicts.
  • Built-in policies: phi_scrubber, schema_validator, length_limit, clinical_action_filter.
  • Evidence bundles: USTAR tar with manifest, ledger excerpt, metrics, drift, overrides, ground-truth.
  • Renamed InferenceEvent → InferenceCommittedBody.

entry.title: v0.1.0 — first public preview
entry.summary: The minimum viable trust substrate: append, sign, chain, verify.
entry.content:
• SQLite-backed Merkle ledger with BLAKE2b-256 + Ed25519.
  • Runtime::open, begin_inference, commit, Ledger::verify.
  • Strong identifier types (ActorId, PatientId, EncounterId, ModelId).
